systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.subtitle: Manage global system configuration parameters
systemSettings.editDescription: Change the value for this system parameter
systemSettings.resyncDescription: Recalculate and update all credit package prices based on the current unit credit price setting. This will overwrite any manually set prices.

aiActionPolicy.title: AI Action Policies
aiActionPolicy.subtitle: Configure credit costs for each AI feature
aiActionPolicy.formulaPatternVariable: Total cost = base cost + unit cost x ceil(applied metric / unit size)
aiActionPolicy.explanationFixed: {{baseLabel}} is currently {{base}} QMC for each usage.
aiActionPolicy.explanationVariable: {{baseLabel}} is {{base}} QMC, {{unitLabelName}} is {{unit}} QMC, and {{sizeLabel}} is {{size}}. The system charges based on {{metric}}.
aiActionPolicy.editDescription: Update display name, description, status, and the credit formula for this action.
aiActionPolicy.formulaSummary: Each usage costs {{base}} QMC flat, plus {{unit}} QMC for every {{size}} {{mode}}. Partial units are rounded up.

generateQuiz.title: Generate Quiz
generateQuiz.description: Credit charged when generating a quiz with AI, based on total question count.

generateFlashcards.title: Generate Flashcards
generateFlashcards.description: Credit charged when generating flashcards with AI, based on total card count.

generateMockTest.title: Generate Mock Test
generateMockTest.description: Credit charged when generating a mock test with AI, based on total question count.
generateMockTest.metric: Total question count in the mock test

previewQuizStructure.title: Preview Quiz Structure
previewQuizStructure.description: Credit charged each time AI drafts a quiz structure preview before quiz generation.

generateRoadmapQuiz.title: Generate quiz in roadmap
generateRoadmapQuiz.description: Credit charged when generating a roadmap knowledge quiz, based on question count.

analyzeStudyProfileKnowledge.title: Analyze Study Profile Knowledge
analyzeStudyProfileKnowledge.description: Credit charged each time AI analyzes the study profile knowledge input.

suggestStudyProfileFields.title: Suggest Study Profile Fields
suggestStudyProfileFields.description: Credit charged each time AI suggests study profile fields.

suggestStudyProfileExamTemplates.title: Suggest Study Profile Exam Templates
suggestStudyProfileExamTemplates.description: Credit charged each time AI suggests or generates study profile exam templates.

validateStudyProfileConsistency.title: Validate Study Profile Consistency
validateStudyProfileConsistency.description: Credit charged each time AI validates study profile consistency.

processPdf.title: Process PDF
processPdf.description: Credit charged for PDF processing, based on total page count.

processImage.title: Process Image
processImage.description: Credit charged for image processing, fixed cost per upload.

processText.title: Process Text
processText.description: Credit charged for plain text processing, based on total word count.

processDocx.title: Process Word
processDocx.description: Credit charged for Word document processing, based on total word count.

processXlsx.title: Process Excel
processXlsx.description: Credit charged for Excel processing, based on populated cell count.

processPptx.title: Process PowerPoint
processPptx.description: Credit charged for PowerPoint processing, based on slide count.

processAudio.title: Process Audio
processAudio.description: Credit charged for audio processing, based on duration in seconds.

processVideo.title: Process Video
processVideo.description: Credit charged for video processing, based on duration in seconds.

dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back, here is what is happening today.
dashboard.superAdminDesc: Welcome to the Super Admin control center.
dashboard.revenueCommandDeckDesc: Track captured revenue, pending transactions, payment state, and the current plans or credit surface of QuizMateAI in one place.
dashboard.commandDeckDesc: A single operating surface for users, groups, plans, payments, RBAC, and AI audit activity across the system.
dashboard.loadError: Unable to load the admin dashboard.
dashboard.partialData: Some modules could not be loaded completely, so the dashboard is showing the available data only.
dashboard.systemSignalsDesc: Core signals for identities, groups, AI audit, and access structure in one dense board.
dashboard.accountMixDesc: See how identities, roles, and recent operating rhythm are distributed across the platform.
dashboard.recentGroupsDesc: Newest or most noticeable group spaces currently visible in the system.
dashboard.accessFabricDesc: System roles and permission density currently mapped across RBAC.
dashboard.aiCommandFeedDesc: Recent AI activity to track models, features, and token volume in one stream.
dashboard.paymentHealthDesc: Current transaction state across completed, pending, cancelled, and failed payments.
dashboard.catalogSurfaceDesc: Plans, credit packages, and current catalog readiness across QuizMateAI.
dashboard.actionDockDesc: Jump directly into the main operating surfaces of QuizMateAI from one navigation cluster.
dashboard.noGroups: No group data is available yet.
dashboard.noAiAudit: No recent AI audit entries were found.
dashboard.noPayments: No payment traffic has been recorded yet.
dashboard.revenueWindowDesc: See the recent completed revenue rhythm by day so peaks and drops are visible at a glance.
dashboard.revenueWindowYearDesc: Aggregate revenue across the 12 months of the selected year, excluding future periods.
dashboard.revenueWindowMonthDesc: See revenue by day within the selected month, up to today when the current month is selected.
dashboard.revenueWindowWeekDesc: See revenue by day within the selected week, up to today when the current week is selected.
dashboard.emptyRevenueWindow: No completed revenue has been recorded in the last 7 days.
dashboard.recentTransactionsDesc: Review the latest payments with status, billed target, method, and timestamp.
dashboard.methodMixDesc: Compare which payment methods currently drive the most transaction volume and value.
dashboard.monetizationSurfaceDesc: A compact view of plans, credit packs, transaction volume, and the sellable targets currently generating revenue.
dashboard.financeActionsDesc: Jump directly into payments, plan management, and credit packages without navigating through broader admin panels.

actionDescriptions.payments: Open the payment ledger to inspect status, amount, order IDs, and who was billed.
actionDescriptions.plans: Manage the plan catalog and publication status across the system.
actionDescriptions.creditPackages: Track the credit packages on sale and the credit supply surface offered to users.
actionDescriptions.aiAudit: Review AI calls, active models, and token consumption across recent operations.

adminPayments.desc: Look up transactions by order ID, user, workspace, or payment status.

detail.title: Payment Details {{orderId}}

topicManagement.title: Topic & Field Management
topicManagement.desc: Create and organize topics with their fields.

systemConfig.title: Learning Configuration
systemConfig.removedDesc: Domain, Knowledge, Scheme, and Level have been removed. Users configure directly via document description, level, and goals in Workspace.
systemConfig.description: Create and maintain domains, knowledge, schemes, and levels used across the platform.
systemConfig.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or status...
systemConfig.readDeniedDescription: Your account does not currently have permission to view learning configuration.

panels.knowledge: Knowledge items belong to a domain and define the base level system.
panels.scheme: Schemes belong to a knowledge item and can refine its evaluation model.
panels.level: Levels belong to a scheme or directly to a knowledge item.

placeholders.description: Add extra context or usage notes...

levelHints.selectParent: Choose a knowledge first to see which level model applies.
levelHints.scoreBased: SCORE_BASED: Enter each score (e.g. 5.0) and press Enter to add to the list.
levelHints.threeLevel: THREE_LEVEL: Levels are auto-created (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced). Edit if needed.

wizard.title: Create step by step
wizard.description: Follow Domain → Knowledge → Scheme → Level for logical flow.
wizard.step1Desc: Create a new domain or select an existing one.
wizard.step2Desc: Select domain and create knowledge. Level system type chosen here applies to scheme and level.
wizard.step3Desc: Scheme is optional. LevelSystemType is inherited from Knowledge and cannot be changed.
wizard.step4Desc: SCORE_BASED: enter scores. THREE_LEVEL: 3 default levels or custom 4-5 levels.
wizard.step1CreateOrSelect: Create a new domain or select an existing one.
wizard.levelSystemTypeHint: Scheme will inherit this type. To change, go back to step 2.
wizard.skipScheme: Skip Scheme (Level belongs directly to Knowledge)
wizard.customLevelNamesRequired: Please enter names for all levels.
wizard.scoreListHint: Enter each score (e.g. 5.0) and press Enter to add to the list.

dialogs.createDescription: Fill in the required fields to add a new item.
dialogs.editDescription: Update the item details and save your changes.
dialogs.deleteDescriptionDomainCascade: Deleting Domain {{name}} will permanently remove the Domain and all Knowledge, Scheme, and Level inside it. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?

plan.title: Choose your learning plan
plan.subtitle: Pick the level of AI support you need without wading through a long list of technical settings.
plan.groupScopeSubtitle: This plan applies only to the current group workspace. Group subscriptions are managed separately from personal plans.
plan.groupEntryTitle: Group plans are managed inside each group
plan.groupScopeLeaderDesc: This purchase only applies to {{groupName}}. As the group leader, you can choose or change the plan for this workspace here.
plan.groupScopeMemberDesc: This purchase only applies to {{groupName}}. Only the group leader can choose or change the plan for this workspace.
plan.groupEntryDesc: Group subscriptions are purchased separately inside each group workspace. Open a group you lead to view its plans and complete checkout there.

creditModel.title: Credit model for AI
creditModel.desc: Buy the plan once, then top up Credits only when you need more AI usage.

plan.noPlans: No plans available for this category.
plan.loadError: Unable to load plans. Please try again.

descriptions.free: Start with the essentials for quiz creation and lightweight study sessions.
descriptions.freeWithLimits: A solid starting point with {{workspaces}} workspaces and {{materials}} materials in each workspace.
descriptions.standard: Expand your daily study flow with more helpful AI tools.
descriptions.recommended: Unlock the full learning workflow with clearer, more practical AI support.
descriptions.premium: Built for focused study sessions with broader AI support and deeper insight.
descriptions.group: Designed for study groups or classrooms that want shared AI-powered workflows.
descriptions.groupWithLimits: A shared study space with {{workspaces}} workspaces and {{materials}} materials per workspace.
descriptions.includesPreviousSimple: Everything in {{previousPlan}}, with a fuller study workflow.

bullets.groupCollab: Shared setup for team study and collaborative material work
bullets.coreAi: Covers the core AI quiz workflow
bullets.upgradedLimits: Upgrades to {{workspaces}} workspaces and {{materials}} materials per workspace
bullets.roadmaps: Generate AI study roadmaps from your materials and goals
bullets.companion: Use an AI companion for quick questions and guided practice
bullets.summaries: Read and summarize dense materials faster with AI
bullets.analytics: Track progress and weak spots with learning analytics
bullets.advancedQuiz: Unlock more advanced quiz types for deeper practice

studyFeatures.title: Premium study tools
studyFeatures.subtitle: Paid plans unlock more practical ways to use AI throughout your study workflow.

roadmap.title: AI study roadmaps
roadmap.desc: Turn materials into a step-by-step study path that is easier to follow.

companion.title: AI companion
companion.desc: Ask quick questions, review faster, and keep momentum while you study.

summary.title: Smart summaries
summary.desc: Condense long materials into the main ideas so review takes less time.

analytics.title: Learning analytics
analytics.desc: Spot strengths, weak areas, and progress patterns sooner.

advancedQuiz.title: Advanced quiz modes
advancedQuiz.desc: Unlock broader quiz setups and more flexible practice sessions.

notes.permanentDesc: Plans do not have to be monthly. Depending on configuration, some plans can be purchased permanently.
notes.creditsDesc: AI features only consume Credits when you actually use them, so spend stays easier to control.
notes.refundDesc: Payments are secured and your Credit purchase history stays available in the wallet.

wallet.title: Quizmate Credits
wallet.subtitle: Check balance, buy more Credits, and view your transaction history.
wallet.hint: Credits are used for AI-powered features in QuizMate.
wallet.buySubtitle: Pick a package to keep using AI features.

rbac.title: RBAC System
rbac.desc: Manage system roles and permissions - Role Based Access Control.
rbac.userRoleDesc: Shows only ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN accounts.
rbac.roleManagementDesc: Create custom roles, review permissions, and sync permissions by role.
rbac.userPermissionDesc: Assign roles and configure permissions for ADMIN accounts. SUPER_ADMIN keeps full default access.
rbac.createRoleDesc: Enter the new role name. The backend will normalize it to uppercase.
rbac.superAdminReadonlyDesc: SUPER_ADMIN always has all default permissions and cannot be edited manually.
rbac.syncRoleDesc: Choose the permissions applied to this role. This action syncs the full permission set for the role.

subscription.title: Subscription Management
subscription.desc: Manage subscription plans and user subscriptions.
subscription.addPlanDesc: Create a new subscription plan with pricing and features.
subscription.planDetailDesc: Detailed information about this subscription plan.
subscription.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the plan "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
subscription.planInUse: This plan has at least 1 user using it
subscription.defaultPlanExists: A default plan already exists for {{type}}. Only 1 INDIVIDUAL default and 1 GROUP default plan are allowed.

aiModels.title: AI Models by capability
aiModels.groupHint: Choose the default model for this capability in the selected plan.

scope.userPlanDescription: For individual accounts, onboarding, and solo learning flows.
scope.workspacePlanDescription: For team workspaces, collaboration, and shared resources.

wizard.dialogEditDescription: Edit the plan step by step so you do not need to scroll through the full configuration in one screen.
wizard.dialogCreateDescription: Create a new plan through a step-by-step flow that is easier to review before saving.
wizard.nextHint: Use the "Next" button to move through each step and keep the dialog compact.
wizard.finalHint: You are on the final step. Save now or jump back to any previous step to adjust.

basic.title: Basics
basic.description: Name the plan, choose its scope, and set the price.

models.title: AI models
models.description: Assign default models for each capability group.

review.title: Review
review.description: Inspect the final setup before saving.

basic.title: Set up the plan
basic.description: Start by defining the plan identity and scope.
basic.editingLocked: Code and scope stay locked while editing to avoid drifting from the active catalog.

fields.levelHint: A level can contain multiple plans, so choose the level that best fits this plan.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe who this plan is for and its main value.

entitlement.title: Entitlements and limits
entitlement.description: Keep this part compact: quantities first, then the capability toggles.
entitlement.maxIndividualWorkspaceHint: Maximum number of individual workspaces allowed by this plan.
entitlement.noneEnabled: No capabilities enabled for this plan yet.

models.title: Default models by capability
models.description: Each capability group should have a default model to reduce manual tuning at the end.
models.inactiveHint: Models outside the ACTIVE state still appear for historical review, but cannot be newly selected.
models.noAssignmentHint: No dedicated model assigned. The system will use the matching default resolution instead.

review.title: Review before saving
review.description: Final step to fine-tune action-level overrides when this plan needs distinct AI behavior.
review.aiOverridesHint: Leave empty to use the default capability model.
review.aiOverridesGroupHint: Only override when this plan truly needs behavior different from the group default model.
review.useDefaultHint: Leave empty to use the default for {{group}}.

aiModels.title: AI Model Catalog
aiModels.subtitle: Manage the system model catalog, activation state, and pricing versions per capability.
aiModels.empty: No models match the current filters.

stats.totalHint: Models stored in the system catalog
stats.assignedHint: Used by at least one plan

pricing.historyDescription: Track the active version and the pricing milestones stored for this model.
pricing.formDescription: Enter source pricing in USD or pull it from the official source, and the system will convert it to VND.
pricing.officialDescription: Auto-fetch input and output pricing from official OpenAI or Gemini pages when the model is supported.
pricing.officialUnsupported: This model does not currently support official auto pricing.
pricing.openEndedHint: Leave blank if this pricing version has no end date yet.

dialogs.createDescription: Add a new model so the system can assign it by capability and plan.
dialogs.editDescription: Update the display metadata and capability group for this model.
dialogs.pricingDescription: Manage model input/output pricing and sync it from official sources when needed.
dialogs.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? If the model has usage history, the backend will archive it instead of hard deleting it.

form.systemDefaultHint: Only used when a plan does not have a valid mapping or when legacy flows require a fallback.

aiCosts.title: AI Costs
aiCosts.subtitle: Separate what the user paid, the actual provider spend, and the margin kept on each AI request.
aiCosts.empty: No requests match the current filters.

detail.title: Request revenue & cost detail
detail.explainCharged: The user paid {{credit}} credits for this request, which equals {{vnd}}.
detail.explainProvider: The actual spend is derived from {{prompt}} input tokens and {{output}} output tokens, totaling about {{actualTokens}} tokens and {{cost}}.
detail.explainMargin: Profit is calculated as user-paid amount minus actual provider cost. The current value is {{profitVnd}}; a negative value means a loss.

auth.loginSubtitle: Login to access your QuizMate account
auth.signUpSubtitle: Let's get you all set up so you can access your personal account.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Don't worry, happens to all of us. Enter your email below to recover your password
auth.enterOTPSubtitle: Enter the OTP code sent to your email
auth.otpSent: OTP code has been sent to your email
auth.loginGoogleFailed: Google login failed. Please try again.
auth.registerOtpSent: An OTP code has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.registerOtpSubtitle: Enter the OTP code sent to your email to complete registration

auth.checkAvailabilityFailed: Unable to check availability, please try again
auth.verifyOTPFailed: OTP verification failed, code is invalid or expired

validation.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
validation.usernameFormat: Username must contain both letters and numbers, allowed characters: . _ @ -
validation.emailAtSymbol: Email must contain exactly one @ symbol
validation.emailLocalPartLength: The part before @ must not exceed 64 characters
validation.emailConsecutiveDots: Email must not contain consecutive dots
validation.emailDotPosition: Email must not start or end with a dot
validation.passwordLength: Password must be more than 8 characters
validation.passwordFormat: Password must contain both letters and numbers

hero.subtitle: Upload your study materials (PDFs, Videos, or URLs) and let our AI build personalized roadmaps and interactive quizzes.

features.title: Revolutionize Your Learning Journey
features.roadmapDesc: Our AI analyzes your materials and generates a step-by-step learning path from basics to advanced.
features.quizDesc: Generate multiple-choice or essay questions instantly from any PDF, YouTube video.
features.companionDesc: Interact with your AI tutor via voice to clear doubts and explain complex concepts in real-time.

testimonials.title: What our students are saying 😍
testimonials.student1Quote: "QuizMate AI completely changed how I prepare for my exams. Generating quizzes from lecture videos is a game changer!"
testimonials.student2Quote: "The AI Roadmap is incredible. It broke down my 200-page textbook into 10 logical learning phases. Highly recommend!"

footer.brandDesc: Empowering students worldwide with AI-driven study tools for a smarter future.
footer.copyright: © 2026 QuizMate AI. Built with intelligence for learners.

dashboard.activityJoined: A new member joined the group

settings.subject: Subject
settings.deleteWarning: Once you delete a group, there is no going back. All data will be permanently removed.
settings.leaderOnly: Only the group leader can modify settings.

notifications.title: Group Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Leaders approve announcements, contributors can draft, and members read published items.

seed.roadmapContent: A new checkpoint is open this week. Please complete pre-learning before Friday.
seed.quizContent: Contributor proposed a quiz refresh for the reading practice set.

group.createDesc: Enter group information and select a topic.
group.noGroupsDesc: Create or join a group to get started!
group.inviteDesc: Enter the email of the person you want to invite.
group.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

workspace.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? This action cannot be undone.

workspace.noWorkspacesDesc: Create your first workspace to get started!

community.title: Shared learning spaces
community.subtitle: Discover personal and group workspaces that are being cloned the most, then turn them into your own private study workspace.
community.shareError: Unable to share this item right now.
community.cloneSuccess: Personal workspace created from the community share.
community.cloneError: Unable to clone this community share right now.
community.emptyDescription: No extra description was provided for this share.
community.empty: No community shares yet. Share a workspace to seed the feed.

profile.materialRequired: Please select at least one material.

prelearning.initInfo: Pre-learning assessment is being created. Please wait for the completion notification!
prelearning.sessionDesc: Evaluate basic skills based on current objectives
prelearning.createError: Unable to create the competency assessment right now. Please try again later.
prelearning.uploadBlockedError: Please complete the Pre-learning assessment before uploading new documents.

workspace.confirmDeleteFlashcard: Are you sure you want to delete this flashcard set?

profileConfig.title: Set up your workspace learning profile
profileConfig.readOnlyDesc: Review the learning profile, goals, and roadmap settings currently stored for this workspace.
profileConfig.editDesc: Move step by step to define your learning intent, knowledge focus, goals, and roadmap or mock-test setup.

confirmProfileDialog.title: Confirm using this profile
confirmProfileDialog.description: Are you sure you want to use this profile? Once confirmed, the current configuration will be saved for this workspace.
confirmProfileDialog.roadmapDisabled: Roadmap is not enabled for this profile.

1.title: Step 1
1.description: Choose the workspace intent and let AI assess the knowledge area.

2.title: Step 2
2.description: Add your current level, goals, and mock-test details if needed.

3.title: Step 3
3.description: Finalize the knowledge amount, study pace, and estimated number of days for the roadmap.

4.title: Step 4
4.description: Finalize the roadmap settings, learning pace, and workspace profile.

STUDY_NEW.title: Study new
STUDY_NEW.description: Start a new topic and build a foundational roadmap from scratch.

REVIEW.title: Review
REVIEW.description: Reinforce what you already studied, choose focus areas, and optionally add a roadmap.

MOCK_TEST.title: Mock test
MOCK_TEST.description: Prepare for a target exam with template setup, target score, and expected exam date.

idle.title: Enter a knowledge topic to start AI analysis
idle.description: The system will infer the best-fit domain from the knowledge topic you enter.

loading.title: AI is analyzing your knowledge input
loading.description: The system is inferring the most relevant field and preparing domain suggestions.

success.title: AI has inferred the most relevant domain
success.description: Confirm the suggested domain to continue to the next step.

stepOne.title: Choose the right workspace intent
stepOne.description: Your choice here changes the fields, recommendations, and configuration flow in the next steps.
stepOne.knowledgeTitle: Your knowledge topic and AI-inferred domain
stepOne.knowledgeDescription: Describe what you want to learn. AI will infer the most relevant domain and suggest a field for you to confirm.
stepOne.noDomainSuggestionTitle: Quizmate AI does not have enough domains to suggest yet.
stepOne.noDomainSuggestionDescription: Add a clearer language, exam, or narrower topic. If this is a shorthand level like N1 or N4, the system will prioritize inferring related domains as soon as it has enough signal.

domainReason.closest: This matches the signal "{{signal}}" inside "{{knowledge}}", so it is the closest domain to what you entered.
domainReason.group: The signal "{{signal}}" belongs to the same knowledge cluster as "{{domain}}", so this domain still stays very close to your input.
domainReason.context: "{{domain}}" sits in the same learning context as "{{knowledge}}", which helps AI expand in the right direction.
domainReason.languagePair: This is a reasonable interpretation if "{{knowledge}}" points to learning or using {{domain}} within this language pair.
domainReason.translation: This fits if you want to translate, compare, or convert content in the direction of {{domain}}.
domainReason.studyBridge: This fits if you want to use one language as the explanation language to learn through {{domain}}.

stepOne.knowledgeNudgeTitle: This knowledge input is still too broad
stepOne.knowledgeNudgeDescription: Add more detail about scope, materials, or target skills so the AI can narrow its recommendations.
stepOne.analysisError: AI analysis failed. Please try again.
stepOne.knowledgeBroadHint: Go back to the Knowledge field and be more specific about the scope, materials, or skills you want to learn.
stepOne.analysisSummaryTitle: Quizmate AI currently understands this as
stepOne.analysisRefinementTitle: You can rewrite it like this
stepOne.roadmapQuestion: Do you want AI to generate a roadmap as well?
stepOne.roadmapDescription: This option only appears for review and mock-test flows.
stepOne.skipRoadmap: No roadmap, keep only the remaining setup

stepTwo.title: Describe your current state
stepTwo.description: Add enough context so the final recommendations match your real level and destination.
stepTwo.mockTestTitle: Set the exam and mock-test template
stepTwo.mockTestDescription: Choose a public or private exam. For public exams, Quizmate AI will show a ready-made reference template that follows the public exam structure.
stepTwo.noPublicExam: No public exams match your current search.
stepTwo.publicTemplateDescription: Quizmate AI shows the public exam structure right away so you can review the real layout before starting the mock test.
stepTwo.supportNoticeDescription: Quizmate AI currently works best for multiple-choice sections. Writing and Listening are not fully supported yet, so the template below is mainly for understanding the public exam structure.
stepTwo.templateDescription: Describe your preferred mock-test structure, then generate a UI preview right inside this step.
stepTwo.contextTitle: Aligned with the confirmed context from step 1
stepTwo.contextDescription: Every suggestion in this step is based on the knowledge "{{knowledge}}" inside the domain "{{domain}}". Describe your actual ability in this scope, not your overall strengths.
stepTwo.currentLevelDescription: Describe your current level inside the selected knowledge and domain, for example solid N5 foundation, basic kanji knowledge, or weak N4 grammar.
stepTwo.strengthWeaknessTitle: 2. Strengths and weaknesses in this exact scope
stepTwo.strengthWeaknessDescription: The strengths and weaknesses here must describe sub-areas directly inside the knowledge you are learning, such as grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, or kanji; do not switch to a different subject such as math.
stepTwo.waitForCurrentLevelTitle: Fill in your current level first
stepTwo.waitForCurrentLevelDescription: After you describe your current level, AI will suggest strengths and weaknesses that match the selected knowledge more closely.
stepTwo.beginnerContextTitle: You are currently at the starting stage
stepTwo.beginnerContextDescription: At this stage, you do not need clear strengths or weaknesses inside {{scope}} yet. You can briefly say that you are still building the basics, then refine it later after you have studied for a while.
stepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion1: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear strength yet.
stepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion2: Still building the basic foundation for {{scope}} from scratch.
stepTwo.beginnerStrongSuggestion3: Ready to learn consistently and follow an entry-level path for {{scope}}.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion1: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear weakness yet.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion2: Not yet familiar with the core terms, question types, or baseline skills in {{scope}}.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestion3: Need more time to build basic study habits and early-stage reflexes.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestionJapanese1: The learner is still weak in the foundation of {{scope}}, especially hiragana, katakana, basic vocabulary, and basic sentence patterns.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestionJapanese2: Not yet comfortable with basic Japanese listening, reading, and response patterns within {{scope}}.
stepTwo.beginnerWeakSuggestionJapanese3: Need time to remember characters, vocabulary, and beginner grammar.
stepTwo.learningGoalDescription: Your learning goal should move from your current level toward the exact knowledge scope you are studying. AI only suggests a tighter goal after it has your current level, strengths, and weaknesses.
stepTwo.waitForGoalTitle: Add strengths and weaknesses for a better goal suggestion
stepTwo.waitForGoalDescription: Once current level, strengths, and weaknesses are filled with the right context, AI will suggest a more specific learning goal. You can still type your own goal if your real situation is different.
stepTwo.beginnerWaitForGoalTitle: You can still set a learning goal from the very beginning
stepTwo.beginnerWaitForGoalDescription: If you do not have clear strengths or weaknesses in {{scope}} yet, you can briefly say that you are still building the basics. AI can still suggest a useful starting goal.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestion1: Build a basic foundation in {{scope}} before raising the difficulty.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestion2: Set up a steady beginner path for {{scope}} in the first phase.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestionJapanese1: Learn hiragana, katakana, and core vocabulary before aiming higher.
stepTwo.beginnerLearningGoalSuggestionJapanese2: Get comfortable with basic sentence patterns and early Japanese reflexes in the first few weeks.
stepTwo.fieldSuggestionLoading: AI is analyzing step 2 and updating suggestions based on the context you entered...
stepTwo.overallReviewLoadingTitle: AI is reviewing the full step
stepTwo.overallReviewLoadingDescription: The system is checking whether your current level, strengths, weaknesses, and learning goal still match the knowledge you selected.
stepTwo.overallReviewPendingTitle: The overall review will appear after you fill enough detail
stepTwo.overallReviewPendingDescription: Fill in your current level, strengths, weaknesses, and learning goal. Then AI will check whether the whole step 2 stays aligned with the knowledge and domain you selected.
stepTwo.beginnerOverallReviewPendingDescription: Fill in your current level and learning goal. If you are just starting, strengths and weaknesses can stay empty or simply say that you are still building the basics in {{scope}}.
stepTwo.aiRecommendationNotice: This is AI guidance only. You can still adjust it to match your real situation.

stepThree.summaryDescription: Review the main goal so the roadmap and final recommendations stay aligned with this workspace.
stepThree.improvementDescription: Choose one or more areas for AI to prioritize in the roadmap, review plan, or mock test.
stepThree.roadmapDescription: Separate how much knowledge you want to cover from how quickly you want to absorb it, how many days you plan to study, and how many minutes you should spend each day.
stepThree.knowledgeLoadHint: Knowledge amount defines how much content you want to learn. Study speed only defines the time pace, while the system spreads that workload across recommended days and minutes per day.
stepThree.scheduleInsightSuggested: With the current setup, Quizmate AI recommends about {{days}} days at the {{speed}} pace to cover the selected amount of knowledge.
stepThree.scheduleInsightAdjusted: You entered {{days}} days, so the system automatically mapped this to the {{speed}} pace. The nearest suggested baseline is {{recommendedDays}} days.
stepThree.minutesInsightSuggested: To spread the workload evenly across {{days}} days, Quizmate AI recommends about {{minutes}} minutes/day.
stepThree.minutesInsightAdjusted: You are currently setting {{minutes}} minutes/day. For this setup, the balanced recommendation is about {{recommendedMinutes}} minutes/day.
stepThree.noRoadmapDescription: The wizard will still save your goals, focus areas, and mock-test information.
stepThree.mockGoalDescription: Select an AI-recommended score for a public exam or enter a custom target for a private one.

messages.mockTemplateGenerating: The template is being generated. The wizard will move to the next step automatically when it is ready.
messages.mockTemplateReady: The template is ready. You can continue to the next step.
messages.mockTemplateStatusError: The template status could not be checked right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
messages.mockTemplateAwaitingBackend: Waiting for the backend to confirm the template is finished. {{seconds}} seconds elapsed.
messages.mockTemplateLongWait: The backend is still processing the template. {{seconds}} seconds elapsed. Please check the status again if it takes too long.
messages.backgroundMockTestReady: The mock test finished in the background. You can open Mock test to review it now.
messages.saveError: Unable to save the workspace setup progress.

placeholders.knowledgeInput: Examples: IELTS Writing task 2, advanced React hooks, introductory probability...
placeholders.knowledgeDescription: Describe the scope, materials, chapters, or exact skills you want AI to understand better...
placeholders.primaryDomain: The main domain will be filled from the AI suggestion you choose...
placeholders.currentLevel: Examples: IELTS 5.5, comfortable with basic React, grade 11 math...
placeholders.learningGoal: Examples: Reach IELTS 7.0 in three months, master probability for the final exam...

learningGoalByPurpose.STUDY_NEW: Example: Build a solid React foundation and complete a first practical project...
learningGoalByPurpose.REVIEW: Example: Review the weak chapters and recover enough confidence for the final exam...
learningGoalByPurpose.MOCK_TEST: Example: Practice under real exam pressure and stabilize performance before the test...

placeholders.strongAreas: Examples: fast reading, strong memory, solid coding fundamentals...
placeholders.weakAreas: Examples: grammar, time management, higher-order questions...
placeholders.beginnerStrongAreas: Example: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear strength yet...
placeholders.beginnerWeakAreas: Example: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear weakness yet...
placeholders.beginnerWeakAreasJapanese: Example: I am just starting, so I cannot identify a clear weakness yet...
placeholders.publicExamSearch: Search by exam name such as IELTS, TOEIC, JLPT...
placeholders.privateExamName: Type your private exam name or custom format...
placeholders.templatePrompt: Example: Create a mock exam focused on reading and writing, with rising difficulty and common-error review...
placeholders.templateNotes: Example: prioritize scenario-based questions, stay close to the official format, avoid trick questions...

BASIC.title: Basic
BASIC.description: Focus on core foundations, key terms, and the minimum required concepts.

INTERMEDIATE.title: Intermediate
INTERMEDIATE.description: Cover the foundations plus the common real-world applications you are expected to use.

ADVANCED.title: Advanced
ADVANCED.description: Go deeper into harder cases, edge cases, and higher-complexity material.

FLEXIBLE.title: Flexible
FLEXIBLE.description: Adjust the pace according to your real schedule and current energy.

BALANCED.title: Fixed
BALANCED.description: Keep the study plan steady, follow the roadmap closely, and limit pace changes.

INTENSIVE.title: Intensive
INTENSIVE.description: Move faster with a higher workload and denser checkpoints.

SLOW.title: Slow and steady
SLOW.description: Best when you want depth and only have limited time each day.

STANDARD.title: Standard
STANDARD.description: A balanced default pace for most learners.

FAST.title: Fast
FAST.description: Accelerate toward a close deadline or upcoming exam.

questionStats.title: Question Statistics

questionStats.viewQuizDesc: Review completion rate, average score, and performance for each quiz in this workspace.

questionStats.reviewQuizDesc: Once there is enough data, the system will suggest the quiz that needs review first.
questionStats.welcomeDesc: Complete more quizzes to see detailed analysis of your strengths and areas to improve by difficulty and Bloom level.

upload.title: Upload Documents
upload.groupReviewDescription: Your documents will be checked by the group's profile, then queued for leader approval before appearing in shared sources.

navigator.title: Question Navigator

strategyDesc.balanced: Standard weight ratio between difficulty levels. Suitable for most quizzes.
strategyDesc.linear: Evenly increasing weight. Higher difficulty questions receive proportionally more points.
strategyDesc.elite: Strongly rewards hard questions. Ideal for advanced or competitive assessments.
strategyDesc.tight: Nearly equal weight across all levels. Best for knowledge-check quizzes.

quiz.reviewQuizOkHint: When you’ve finished reviewing and the quiz looks good, confirm below. You can’t undo after confirming.
quiz.reviewQuizOkButton: I confirm — this quiz looks good

communityRecommendations.cloneError: Unable to clone this quiz right now.

metrics.title: Recommendation effectiveness
metrics.description: Thirty-day funnel for quizzes recommended in this workspace.

comparison.title: Offline lexical vs semantic comparison
comparison.description: Based on served recommendation snapshots: how many positive outcomes lexical-only would keep, and how many semantic signals actually rescued.

samples.title: Recent sample requests
samples.description: Inspect concrete requests to see which quizzes semantic rescued, what the lexical rank was, and how far each one converted.
samples.rescuedExplanation: Semantic lifted this quiz because lexical rank {{lexicalRank}} would sit outside the {{servedCount}} served slots.
samples.retainedExplanation: This quiz stayed inside lexical top at rank {{lexicalRank}}, so lexical-only could also have shown it.
samples.convertPassed: Downstream outcome: cloned, started, and passed.
samples.convertStarted: Downstream outcome: cloned and started, but no pass event yet.
samples.convertCloned: Downstream outcome: cloned, but no start event yet.
samples.convertNone: No downstream conversion has been recorded for this quiz yet.
samples.emptyRescued: No requests with semantic rescued candidates were found in this time window.
samples.emptyConverted: No requests with downstream conversion were found in this time window.

basic.title: Basics & Ground Rules
basic.description: Group name and the shared operating rules

learning.title: Shared Learning Profile
learning.description: Knowledge, domain, and the team learning rhythm

stepOne.title: Set up the group basics
stepOne.description: Name the group and add shared operating notes so everyone follows the same study rhythm.
stepOne.groupNameHint: Use a short, recognizable name so members can spot this group immediately.
stepOne.memberDescription: Best for regular learners joining the group.
stepOne.contributorDescription: Best for members who can contribute learning content and activities.
stepOne.rulesHint: Capture the study rhythm, collaboration rules, or material-sharing norms the whole group should follow.
stepOne.rulesPlaceholder: Example: Run two check-ins per week, ask questions by topic, and cite the source when sharing materials.

stepTwo.title: Set up the shared learning profile
stepTwo.description: This step defines the shared knowledge scope, the AI domain, and the default learning rhythm for the whole group.

workflow.title: Finish the setup in three focused choices
workflow.description: Describe what the group is learning, pick the AI-suggested domain, and turn on the options that match your learning flow.
workflow.describeDescription: Briefly explain what the group is learning or preparing for.
workflow.domainDescription: Choose the right baseline so the AI understands this workspace correctly.
workflow.modeDescription: Decide whether the group is focused on new learning, review, or mock tests.

stepTwo.knowledgePlaceholder: Example: Our group is studying JLPT N3 to strengthen grammar, vocabulary, and reading practice by topic.
stepTwo.knowledgeHint: The more specific the description is, the better Quizmate AI can suggest the right domain for your group.
stepTwo.selectedDomainHint: This domain becomes the shared baseline for roadmap suggestions, quizzes, and learning activities.
stepTwo.modePrompt: Choose the main learning rhythm for the group
stepTwo.studyNewDescription: Best when the group is learning new material and needs a clear roadmap.
stepTwo.reviewDescription: Best when the group has studied before and wants a structured review flow.
stepTwo.mockTestDescription: Best when the group wants to practice exams and track progress with tests.
stepTwo.groupGoalPlaceholder: Example: Finish 20 grammar themes and 1500 vocabulary items in 8 weeks.
stepTwo.learningSwitchesHint: Turn on a roadmap or entry assessment depending on how your group runs.

analysis.loading: Quizmate AI is analyzing the knowledge scope to suggest the best domain.
analysis.error: Quizmate AI could not generate a reliable domain suggestion yet. You can retry now.
analysis.interpretingLabel: Quizmate AI understands this knowledge as
analysis.tooBroad: The current knowledge scope is still broad. Add a bit more focus if you want more precise suggestions.
analysis.emptyDomainDescription: Quizmate AI could not build domain suggestions from the current description. Try adding more detail or rerun the analysis.

roadmap.title: Enable a shared roadmap
roadmap.description: Create a shared study structure so the whole group has a clearer pace.
roadmap.studyNewDescription: This mode turns the roadmap on by default so the group has a clearer path for new learning.

entryAssessment.title: Require an entry assessment
entryAssessment.description: Apply this to new members before they join the shared learning flow.

payment.invoiceDesc: Review your subscription plan and choose a payment method
payment.momoError: Unable to create MoMo payment. Please try again.
payment.noPlanId: No plan selected. Please go back and choose a plan.
payment.fetchError: Unable to load plan information. Please try again.
payment.selectGroupDesc: Choose a group you lead to apply this subscription plan.
payment.selectGroupFirst: Please select a group on the left before proceeding to payment.

paymentResult.successDesc: Your subscription plan has been activated.
paymentResult.failDesc: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
paymentResult.planReadyHint: Your plan is ready — you can continue learning.

pricingGuide.title: How credit pricing works in QuizmateAI
pricingGuide.subtitle: QuizmateAI does not bill by feature name alone. Credits are calculated from actual AI usage so users can understand what they pay for before they run a job.
pricingGuide.creditCardDescription: The unit used to convert AI usage into something simple to buy, understand, and budget.
pricingGuide.lightRequestHint: A light request such as a 20-question mixed quiz can be around 20-21 credits. OCR and add-ons increase the total.

summaryCards.title: 1 credit
summaryCards.desc: Current starting recommendation is 100 VND per credit.

summaryCards.title: Capability bundle
summaryCards.desc: Price by AI capability groups such as OCR, source understanding, quiz generation, and review.

summaryCards.title: No double charge
summaryCards.desc: If a higher-level package already includes lower-level processing, the UI should not bill that capability twice.

summaryCards.title: Estimate
summaryCards.desc: Show an estimate first, settle against actual usage, and refund unused credits.

pricingGuide.bundleDesc: The system currently uses a simple pricing model so users can understand and estimate quickly. Each source type has one basic credit rule based on its main unit.
pricingGuide.unitTitle: Credit table for core AI features
pricingGuide.unitDesc: This table keeps only the core AI features so users can estimate cost more easily. For quizzes, pricing is based only on total question count, not on individual question types or per-question configs.
pricingGuide.personalizationDesc: These are basic and easy-to-understand suggestions that fit the current system scope.

personalizationItems.title: AI quiz suggestion
personalizationItems.description: AI suggests the next quiz set based on recent study history and results.

personalizationItems.title: AI recommends topics to review
personalizationItems.description: AI points out which topics the learner should review first.

personalizationItems.title: AI material suggestion
personalizationItems.description: AI recommends study materials related to the learner's current topic.

pricingGuide.examplesDesc: These short examples help users estimate credits quickly before running a feature.

examples.title: Upload a 5-page PDF
examples.body: If the system reads and processes all 5 PDF pages, you can estimate the cost directly by page count.

examples.title: Generate a 10-question quiz
examples.body: For a basic quiz set, the fastest estimate is to count the number of questions generated.

examples.title: Generate 20 flashcards
examples.body: Basic flashcards can be estimated by the number of cards created.

examples.title: Paste 2,500 words of TEXT
examples.body: For text input, the system charges by the total number of words being processed.

examples.title: Upload a 4,200-word DOCUMENT
examples.body: Documents are also priced by word count instead of per file.

examples.title: Generate a 25-question quiz
examples.body: Quiz pricing now depends only on total question count, not on individual question types.

examples.title: AI feedback after 1 quiz
examples.body: After finishing a quiz, the learner can request AI feedback for that attempt.

examples.title: Generate 3 roadmap phases
examples.body: When AI is used to create roadmap phases, pricing is based on the number of phases generated.

examples.title: Generate 8 knowledge nodes in a phase
examples.body: Knowledge inside a phase is charged separately by the number of generated knowledge nodes.

pricingGuide.examplesNote: These numbers are simple estimates to help users understand the cost before running a feature.

upgradePlan.title: Upgrade Subscription
upgradePlan.individualDesc: Choose an individual plan that fits your needs
upgradePlan.groupDesc: Choose a group plan to upgrade your team
upgradePlan.noLeaderGroups: You are not a leader of any group.

creditPackage.desc: Manage the portfolio of credit packages used within the system.
creditPackage.title: Credit package management

forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions.
signUpSubtitle: Create your account to start learning with QuizMateAI.

bootstrap.title: Preparing your group workspace
bootstrap.description: The setup wizard will open as soon as the draft workspace is ready.

studio.requireUploadBeforeActions: Upload at least one document in the Documents tab before using this feature.

forms.loadMaterialsError: Unable to load shared documents. Please close and reopen this form.
forms.workspaceMaterialsEmpty: No shared documents yet. Upload files in the Documents tab, then select them directly in this form.
forms.sourceSelectHint: Choose the documents AI should use for this creation.

upload.insufficientQmcNeedPlan: Your group doesn't have enough QMC. Please purchase a plan to continue — then you can buy credits in the group wallet.
upload.insufficientQmcNeedCredits: Your group doesn't have enough QMC. Open the group wallet to buy more credits.

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.description: Compete with your group members in real-time quiz challenges.
challenge.cancelDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this challenge? Members will no longer be able to join and the schedule will be removed.
challenge.reviewerMustViewQuizHint: Tap «View quiz», review the content, then return here to Approve or Reject.
challenge.snapshotQuizHint: Preview content and status; edit via Compose before the challenge starts.
challenge.quizSnapshotReviewDraftBody: This exam belongs to a challenge, not the shared group quiz list. Members only take it when the challenge starts. Use the Check tab to review content, edit via Compose, then Publish when ready — there is no group-wide distribution like normal group quizzes.
challenge.quizSnapshotReviewNoTakeHint: This exam only opens when the challenge starts (on schedule or when the leader runs it). Rankings are per challenge — you cannot start the exam from this screen.
challenge.editDialogDescription: You can only edit when more than 1 hour remains before the scheduled start. Double-check timezone and duration.
challenge.leaderFairPlayQuizHint: You're competing: after the quiz is published you can't preview questions. While it's still a draft you can compose and review.
challenge.reviewContributorsHint: Invite members to review the quiz with you. When everyone is aligned, you publish the snapshot as usual. Assigned members cannot register as participants; you cannot assign current participants.
challenge.reviewInviteeNotice: You were invited to review and give feedback to the leader (off-app is fine). No in-app approval is required — the leader publishes when ready.
challenge.reviewInviteeShortHint: Tap «View quiz» in the Quiz challenge block above, then open the «Check» tab.
challenge.reviewQuizNotReadyHint: The quiz isn’t ready to open yet (e.g. still generating). Try again later.
challenge.reviewContributorCannotRegister: You are assigned as a quiz reviewer, so you cannot register for this challenge.

aiAudit.title: AI Audit
aiAudit.description: Track AI requests, token usage, models, statuses, and open detailed traces when needed.

errors.loadLogs: Unable to load AI audit logs.

metrics.errorsHint: Errored requests on the current page

table.title: AI request list
table.empty: No AI audit logs match the current filters.

detail.title: AI request details
detail.apiKeyHint: The key is masked so the real secret is not exposed.
detail.missing: This request is no longer present in the current list. Close the dialog and refresh the list if needed.

aiProviders.subtitle: Overview of provider catalogs, health status, and models grouped by provider.
aiProviders.providerHint: {{count}} models in catalog, {{active}} active and {{archived}} archived.
